# Furniture100

> Furniture100 is a UK online furniture boutique offering lounge chairs, dining furniture, bar stools, office chairs and accent pieces with free UK delivery and 30-day returns.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Curated collections and featured furniture.
- [Shop](/shop): Browse the full Furniture100 catalogue.
- [About](/about): Our story, values, and design philosophy.
- [Delivery](/delivery): Free UK delivery info, lead times and tracking.
- [Returns](/returns): 30-day return policy and how to arrange collection.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch with our team.

## Categories

- [Accent & Lounge Chairs](/category/lounge-chairs): Statement seating and accent chairs.
- [Dining](/category/dining): Dining tables, chairs and sets.
- [Bar Stools](/category/bar-stools): Counter and bar height stools.
- [Office Chairs](/category/office-chairs): Ergonomic and design-led office seating.

## Optional

- [Privacy](/privacy): Privacy policy.
- [Terms](/terms): Terms of service.
